runes.notes:
Can be useful in late boss waves (up to 1:30 / 9% ATK boost)

Note: A tier only for late half of boss waves. 
As each regular wave is only 20 seconds long, this rune will provide up to 2% ATK during normal mob waves (i.e. max C tier for normal waves)

runes.name: Rune of Gold Furnace

descriptions.legendary: ATK +3.5%, On Immortal Summon, Physical DMG + 0.08% for every 500 Gold spent (up to 15%)
descriptions.mythic: ATK +5%, On Immortal Summon, Physical DMG + 0.12% for every 500 Gold spent (up to 20%)
descriptions.immortal: ATK +6.5%, On Immortal Summon, Physical DMG + 0.16% for every 500 Gold spent (up to 20%)

runes.notes:
Must strategize equipped immortal for late summon
83.3k gold spent (about 580 summon cost) for max

English, French, German, Spanish version descriptions are ambiguous. The real mechanism here is "DMG +x% for every 500 Gold to be spent after summon", so it is now recommended for mid-game immortal summons

Max (+15%/+20% DMG) requirements:
Legendary: (187.5* 500) = 93,750 Gold spent (~Spamming from 200 - 640 cost)
Mythic: (166.6*500) = 83,333 Gold spent (~Spamming from 200 - 610 cost)
Immortal: (125*500) = 62,500 Gold spent (~Spamming from 200 - 540 cost)

Important: This rune will perform poorly in PVP or Guild Raid. Switch this rune out before playing these modes!
